task_completion.description: Open and read the mosaic imaging plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/mosaic_plan.txt.

task_completion.description: Configure the capture sequence for H-alpha filter and 3 frames per panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos capture module showing the filter set to H-alpha (or slot 5) and the frame count set to 3.

task_completion.description: Set up the 4 mosaic panels for the target
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos scheduler, capture module, or mosaic planner showing 4 distinct panels or jobs configured for the target coordinates.

task_completion.description: Capture and save the frames to the respective panel subdirectories
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal, or Ekos capture progress showing FITS files successfully saved inside ~/Images/veil_mosaic/panel_1, panel_2, panel_3, and panel_4.

task_completion.description: Generate the required mosaic log file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the newly created ~/Documents/mosaic_log.txt with logging details of the captured panels.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual astronomy software to capture frames
integrity.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos GUI is visible and actively used in the screenshots, rather than relying solely on mock terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent captured real FITS files rather than creating dummy files
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager shows realistic file sizes for the FITS files (not 0 bytes), or the KStars FITS Viewer is seen displaying the captured images.

integrity.description: Agent generated a genuine log rather than copying the plan
integrity.visual_evidence: The mosaic_log.txt file contains execution-specific details (e.g., completion statuses, timestamps, or actual captured file names) rather than just being a direct copy-paste of mosaic_plan.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: NGC 6992 (Eastern Veil Nebula) at RA 20.94h, Dec 31.717°. Required filter: Slot 5 (H-alpha). Required frames: 3 per panel across 4 panels (panel_1, panel_2, panel_3, panel_4). Base image directory: /home/ga/Images/veil_mosaic. Log file: /home/ga/Documents/mosaic_log.txt. Plan file: /home/ga/Documents/mosaic_plan.txt.
